# @hai3/perf-telemetry

> Action-first performance telemetry for HAI3 using OpenTelemetry Browser SDK. Every span belongs to a named action.

Part of the HAI3 SDK Layer (L1) - can be used independently without other @hai3 packages. Peer dependencies on @opentelemetry/* and react.

## Core API

- [TelemetryProvider](https://hai3.dev/docs/perf-telemetry/provider): React context provider for OTel initialization
- [useRoutePerf](https://hai3.dev/docs/perf-telemetry/hooks#routeperf): Route navigation span
- [useDoneRendering](https://hai3.dev/docs/perf-telemetry/hooks#donerendering): Render readiness signal with paint timing
- [useTelemetryAction](https://hai3.dev/docs/perf-telemetry/hooks#action): Critical action wrapper
- [instrumentedFetch](https://hai3.dev/docs/perf-telemetry/hooks#fetch): API call with span correlation
- [useWebVitals](https://hai3.dev/docs/perf-telemetry/hooks#webvitals): LCP, CLS, INP, TTFB collection
- [telemetryStore](https://hai3.dev/docs/perf-telemetry/store): In-memory span collector for dev tools

## Key Patterns

- Every span MUST belong to a named action (no orphan spans)
- Ambient action fallback for passive signals (web vitals, long tasks)
- Fail-open: telemetry errors never crash business flows
- Action-first correlation: active -> recent -> ambient resolution
- Export gating: collector export toggleable independently from local capture
